required_success_condition: Capture a direct journal or publisher correction/retraction/notice text for the verified SAGE-linked article.

novelty_gain: different publisher family from the existing Springer anchor; journal-article venue continuity
shared_caption_delta_if_successful: Rewrites the current Table 1E ceiling from one direct notice exemplar to two direct notice exemplars while keeping process-integrity depth unchanged.
paper_thesis_use: Best near-term route to reduce the single-publisher-notice objection in methods/results prose and thesis claim-support maps.
observatory_hook: Notice-depth closure board; Table 1E caption rewrite trigger; publisher-diversity facet
caution: Do not describe final editorial action as complete unless the journal or publisher record is directly captured.
